violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the soda lines in the bar ice wells were observed with black residue. The unused water wall was observed with debris. The non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned as often as necessary. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026
The floors under the cookline and under the 3-bay sink was observed with an accumulation of grease and food debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

Raw animal foods (such as beef and wontons) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as veggies) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Foods were relocated to proper areas. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2026

Salmon and tuna poke bowls are served raw or undercooked to the customer's request. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2026

Insect sticky traps were observed hanging from the ceiling in the kitchen. Insect control devices shall be installed in a manner to prevent possible contamination of food/equipment/single service items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2026

The following was observed of non-food contact surfaces: 1) The exterior/interior of the prep units were observed with food debris 2) The exterior/interior of the sliding door coolers were observed with food debris 3) The prep table near the cookline was observed with foil/food debris New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2026

The walls behind the cookline has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2026

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the dry storage areas. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2026

The thermometer is the sushi display cooler was observed to be in poor repair (inaccurate reading of temperature). Thermometers disposed of at the time of inspection. New thermometers to be placed in units to accurately read ambient temperature of refrigeration units. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025
The establishment did not keep Time as a Public Health Control logs for 90 days for sushi rice. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Various foods were observed cooling in containers and covered on the counter and prep unit cooler. Foods left uncovered/moved to walk-in cooler to cool properly. Proper cooling methods reviewed with person in charge. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025

Reduced oxygen packaged fish labeled "KEEP FROZEN" was observed thawing with the package in-tact. Fish was observed at 33 degrees Fahrenheit and removed from packaging. Reduced oxygen seafood must be removed from the bag to allow for proper oxygen transfer. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sinks at the bar. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2025
The faucet of the prep sink was observed to be leaking. Per PIC, a maintenance service has been requested. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2025

The floors under the cookline have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the dry food storage area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2025
